title: Compliance: coap_oscore.c OSCORE
description: Policy: 06-security.md §8.7. File: lichen/subsys/lichen/oscore/coap_oscore.c. Status: COMPLIANT. CoAP-OSCORE integration middleware provides coap_oscore_unprotect_request and coap_oscore_protect_response for Zephyr CoAP server integration.
close_reason: Verified compliant: All memcpy ops bounds-checked (lines 72-76, 109-112), no banned functions, all return values checked, no VLAs, explicit buffer size params on all functions, security trust boundary documented (lines 61-66). Minor: could add _Nonnull annotations but no functional safety issues.
